tailored.summary: I am a Senior Python Engineer with 6 years of experience building scalable and reliable microservices. I have a proven track record in developing high-availability systems using Python and FastAPI, containerizing applications with Docker, orchestrating them in Kubernetes, and implementing robust CI/CD pipelines. My expertise includes optimizing PostgreSQL databases and leveraging Redis for caching, ensuring efficient and performant software engineering.

bullets: Designed and maintained FastAPI microservices handling 10M requests/day, ensuring high-availability and scalability.
Managed Kubernetes clusters and CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, supporting reliable deployments.
Reduced PostgreSQL query latency by 40% through indexing and caching with Redis, enhancing system performance.
Built REST APIs with Python and FastAPI serving 50k daily users, focusing on reliability.
Containerized services with Docker and contributed to Kubernetes migration, improving deployment scalability.
Implemented Celery task queues for asynchronous processing, enhancing the efficiency of background jobs.
